name: Activity And Recreation Center
description: Come play pickleball at Activity And Recreation Center in Columbia, MO! There are 3 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water. A membership is required to play.

name: Albert-Oakland Park
description: Come play pickleball at Albert-Oakland Park in Columbia, MO! There are 12 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and lights. The courts are free.

name: Ashland City Park
description: Ashland City Park is a place to play pickleball in Ashland, MO. There are 2 outdoor concrete courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free.

name: Columbia Sports Fieldhouse
description: Columbia Sports Fieldhouse is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Columbia, MO. There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to restrooms. A one-time fee is required to play. The courts can be reserved.

name: Missouri Athletic Center
description: Missouri Athletic Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Columbia, MO. There are 6 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms.

name: Phillips Park
description: Phillips Park is a place to play pickleball in Columbia, MO. There are 4 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The courts cannot be reserved.

name: Rock Quarry Park
description: Rock Quarry Park is a place to play pickleball in Columbia, MO. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free.

name: Shepard Blvd. Park
description: Come play pickleball at Shepard Blvd. Park in Columbia, MO! There are 2 outdoor courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free.

name: The Kitchen
description: The Kitchen is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Columbia, MO. There are 10 hard courts. 6 are indoors and 4 are outdoors. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include food, restrooms, and water. You can reserve the courts. The courts are private.

name: The Kitchen Grill & Games
description: The Kitchen at Discovery is an indoor/outdoor entertainment complex that features pickleball, games, ice-skating, live music, event space as well as a great food and beverage setting.

name: Trail Stop Pickleball
description: Part of Trail Stop Brewery.  Come play and game and then relax with a beer and a pizza!
fees: Fee required — Free CourtReserve membership for scheduling
